zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Crawley於1628年出生在英國米德萊可時，她的父親Izaac Crawley28歲，母親Elizabeth Sawyer28歲。她於1655年1月21日與Henry Berry在英國倫敦結婚。她去世於1667年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Crawley于1628年出生在英国米德萊可时，她的父亲Izaac Crawley28岁，母亲Elizabeth Sawyer28岁。她于1655年1月21日与Henry Berry在英国倫敦结婚。她去世于1667年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可可利斯丘其享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crawley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places called Crawley, for example in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Sussex, and Oxfordshire, named with Old English crāwe ‘crow’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Crowley .

Irish (Louth): in Ireland, this is generally the English name in 1 above, but it may also have been adopted for McCrawley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghallaigh ‘son of Raghallach’, also Anglicized as Magreely.

variants.name: Crilly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghailligh ‘son of Raghailleach’. Compare Crawley .

variants.name: Crowley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Kieran, Aileen, Assumpta, Bridie, Declan, Donovan, Kaitlin, Kevin Patrick, Maeve, Patrick Joseph.

Irish (Cork): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Cruadhlaoich ‘descendant of Cruadhlaoch’, a personal name composed of the elements cruadh ‘hardy’ + laoch ‘hero’. There has been some confusion with Crawley .

variants.name: Craley
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Crawley   (compare   Cralle  ). This surname is also found in England, but not before the early 17th century.
In some cases an Americanized form of Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian   Kralj   ‘king’.

variants.name: Creely
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): alternative Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghallaigh (see Crawley ).

variants.name: Cralle
meanings: Possibly also an Americanized form of German Kralle (see Krall ).

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Crawley was born in 1628, in Middlesex, England, her father, Izaac Crawley, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Sawyer, was 28. She married Henry Berry on 21 January 1655, in London, England. She died in 1667, in Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Crawley est née en 1628, à Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Izaac Crawley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sawyer, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Berry le 21 janvier 1655, à Londres, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1667, à Christchurch, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 39 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Crawley(이)가 1628년 영국 미들레세스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Izaac Crawley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Sawyer(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1655년 1월 21일 영국 런던에서 Henry Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1667년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트c후르치에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Crawley родилась в 1628 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Izaac Crawley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sawyer, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Berry 21 января 1655 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. Она умерла в 1667 г. в местности крисчурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 39 лет.
